metadata.title: BIRTH VIBES — Discover Your Moment with AI
metadata.description: Find out what was playing in cinemas and on the radio when you were born.
metadata.keywords: BIRTH VIBES, birth vibe, AI, cinema, radio, birthday
metadata.ogDescription: I just discovered my birth vibe — movie, music and the moment I entered the world.

home.heroSubtitle: Find out what was happening in cinemas and on the radio while you were being born.
home.footerTagline: Built with AI + a bit of magic ✨

birth.subtitle: Pick your birthday and discover your birth vibes.
birth.errorPickDate: Please pick your birth date first.
birth.musicHeading: 🎵 This was playing while you were being born
birth.shareLinkedInNotice: Text copied. Paste it into the LinkedIn post after the share window opens.
birth.shareLinkedInFallback: LinkedIn does not reliably prefill text. Copy your story manually and paste it into the post.
birth.shareErrorLocalhost: Sharing from localhost is limited. Add NEXT_PUBLIC_APP_URL to .env.local with your deployed app URL.
birth.movieUnavailable: 🎬 Movie highlight not available for this date.
birth.shareIntroEnglish: This is how my story began 🎬
birth.shareIntroFrench: Voici comment mon histoire a commencé 🎬
birth.shareIntroItalian: Così è iniziata la mia storia 🎬

cookie.title: Cookie notice
cookie.description: We use cookies and local storage to remember settings. We also collect submitted queries (for example search text, name, date and time values) to improve app quality and analytics.
